tagline: Soul and beloved, in historic downtown Santa Rosa
seoDescription: Joon Hair — a luxury hair salon in historic downtown Santa Rosa, CA, specializing in precision cuts, custom color, balayage, keratin smoothing, extensions, and special-event styling.
heroHeading: A Persian word for beloved, a salon to match
heroSubheading: Joon Hair is a luxury salon in the heart of historic downtown Santa Rosa, where a team of skilled stylists creates custom cuts, color, and special-event looks for every client.
highlights: Historic downtown Santa Rosa, on 5th St
aboutBody: Joon Hair sits in the heart of historic downtown Santa Rosa on 5th Street. The name 'Joon' is a Persian term of endearment meaning 'soul' and 'beloved' — chosen by the salon's owners, a married couple of Persian heritage, to set the open, welcoming tone they wanted their clients to feel from the moment they walk in.

The salon's approach blends classic technique with current trends, tailoring each look to the individual rather than forcing a single style. Its stylists specialize in custom color — balayage, foilyage, tint, and corrective work — alongside precision cuts for women and men, blowout styling, keratin smoothing, and hair extensions.
Joon Hair is also a go-to for special-event styling, from bridal hair and makeup to birthdays and business looks. The team includes stylists Shireen, Aliyah, Terra, Lori, Lupe, Shana, Nina, and Alex.

services.title: Haircuts & Styling
services.description: Precision cuts for women ($80–$160) and men ($90–$120), plus blowout styling from $60. Each cut is tailored to the individual rather than a one-size template.

services.title: Custom Color
services.description: Single-process tint from $75, full highlights, and corrective color, by stylists who specialize in customized, natural-looking results.

services.title: Balayage & Foilyage
services.description: Hand-painted balayage and foilyage from $75 up to $325+, for lived-in, dimensional color that grows out gracefully.

services.title: Keratin & Treatments
services.description: Keratin smoothing treatments from $165 (consultation required) to tame frizz and add shine and manageability.

services.title: Extensions
services.description: Hair extensions for length and volume, fitted after a personal consultation.

services.title: Special-Event & Bridal
services.description: Updos and styling for weddings, business, and celebrations, plus bridal makeup from $300.

notes: Verified via official site joonhair.net, Yelp, Fresha, Instagram (June 2026). Owners: married wife-wife couple of Persian heritage (names not publicly listed — left out of copy). Phone (707) 575-1474 and email letschat@joonhair.net confirmed on official site. Address 205 5th St Ste D, Santa Rosa CA 95401. Hours Tue–Fri 9–7, Sat 9–4, closed Sun/Mon (official site; some directories list Tue 9–6 — site value used). Rating 4.5 stars / 100 reviews per Yelp (count grows; site shows real photos so no number is fabricated). Prices from official site service menu. Instagram handle is @joon__hair (double underscore) — verified; the joonhair.net footer's @joon.hair appears to be a typo. A 'Since 1985' line appears in directory blurbs but traces to a stylist-network education program, NOT Joon Hair's founding — established left blank. realPhotoUrls preserved as the existing local /images/joon-hair/*.webp wiring (real salon photos already downloaded); actual source images are on squarespace-cdn.com.
